latin: Marsellus Wallace num tibi similis videtur ei qui patitur? nolo audire excusationes. ille vir vindictam sumet, et tu id scis.

questions.prompt: What is implied about Marsellus Wallace?
questions.target: He does not tolerate disrespect and will seek vengeance
choices: He does not tolerate disrespect and will seek vengeance

questions.prompt: What does the speaker refuse to hear?

translation: Does Marsellus Wallace look like someone who tolerates insults? I don't want to hear excuses. That man will take his vengeance, and you know it.
